description: Make screenshot_path resilient to screenshot-before-result races and invalid historical placeholder values.
steps: Reproduce the race where screenshot upload finishes before the first asin_data insert
Hydrate screenshot_path from screenshots on save_result and on result reads when the stored value is invalid
Verify with a regression test and a direct repro script
notes: Local data/scraper.db does not contain the user-reported ASINs, so verification used an isolated temp DB reproduction.
